description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a beige plastic chassis and a standard key layout, including a numeric keypad on the right. The keycaps are white and slightly raised, with visible legends printed on each key. The keyboard features a row of function keys at the top and a set of brownish accent keys, likely for special functions or navigation. The surface of the keyboard shows signs of age, with some discoloration and minor scuff marks, particularly on the edges. A small rectangular label or logo is present in the upper right corner, adding a touch of branding. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, typical of older mechanical or membrane keyboards.
description: A beige, full-size computer keyboard with white keycaps, numeric keypad, and visible signs of wear. It features a rectangular label in the upper right and brown accent keys.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area, function row, and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled left-side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the raised profile of the keycaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge and the uniform row of keycaps, with less detail on the key legends.
description_view_3: Angled right-side view focusing on the numeric keypad and the visible label or logo in the upper right corner.
